subcategory: badge tabs with animated pill indicator
use_cases: Navigating between content sections while displaying notification counts
Creating dashboard or settings interfaces with tabbed navigation
Building messaging or inbox views with unread counts on each section
Organizing content into categories with animated tab switching
Implementing notification panels or alert management interfaces
ai_summary: A badge tabs component featuring animated tab switching with a morphing pill indicator that smoothly transitions between tab items. Each tab can display a count badge, making it ideal for notification-based navigation in dashboards, messaging apps, or settings interfaces. Uses Framer Motion for fluid animations and supports hover effects with scale transforms.
